stories.title: How Alex Freeman's Pro Bowl dad helped him live hi...
stories.summary: Antonio Freeman taught son Alex what it takes to be a pro. It was his mom and his stepdad, though, who taught the USMNT defender to love soccer.

stories.title: If there was a time to dream big about the USMNT a...
stories.summary: There's something different about this team: The players feel it, and we can all see it. So why not believe?

stories.title: Schwarber's 3 HRs, Harper's cycle propel Phillies
stories.summary: Kyle Schwarber hit three home runs and Bryce Harper became the 11th player in franchise history to hit for the cycle as the Phillies beat the Mets 15-3.

stories.title: Ivory Coast boss slams Germany's 'lack of fair pla...
stories.summary: Ivory Coast head coach Emerse Faé has criticized what he said was a lack of fair play from Germany during his team's 2-1 World Cup defeat on Saturday at BMO Field.

stories.title: Curaçao GK ties Howard's WC save record in draw
stories.summary: Curaçao goalkeeper Eloy Room made 15 saves to equal the World Cup record and help earn the island nation its first-ever World Cup point with a 0-0 draw against heavily favored Ecuador on Saturday.
